acceptance_schema.boundary_note: Schema only; no accepted source is recorded.

acceptance_schema.boundary_note: No source is claimed as verified.
acceptance_schema.required_value_rule: Must classify the future candidate as peer-reviewed article, book chapter, standards document, or other explicitly allowed source type.
Must state whether the source supports governance framing, toy scope, lineage, limitation framing, or evaluation design only.
Must state that the source does not validate project results, prove safety, approve readiness, or complete citation integration.

acceptance_schema.boundary_note: No real biological datasets, no real pathogen models, no receptor parameters, and no operational targeting are introduced.
acceptance_schema.required_value_rule: Must be rejected if it contains real biological datasets, real pathogen simulation, receptor parameters, operational targeting, or actionable biosafety-risk instructions.

acceptance_schema.boundary_note: No source is claimed as verified.
acceptance_schema.required_value_rule: Must remain unverified until a separate retrieval and verification milestone records evidence.
Must remain not integrated until a separate citation integration milestone.

acceptance_schema.boundary_note: Manuscript submission ready count remains zero.

acceptance_schema.boundary_note: Future source retrieval requires a separate official milestone.

rejection_schema.rejection_rule: Reject imaginary, unverifiable, placeholder, or fabricated references.

rejection_schema.boundary_note: No real biological datasets and no real pathogen models are introduced.
rejection_schema.rejection_rule: Reject candidates that require or describe real biological datasets, real pathogen simulations, or operational biological modeling.

rejection_schema.boundary_note: No receptor parameters and no operational targeting are introduced.
rejection_schema.rejection_rule: Reject candidates containing receptor parameters, operational targeting, host tropism mechanics, or host range prediction.

rejection_schema.boundary_note: Wet-lab protocol count and actionable biosafety-risk instruction count remain zero.
rejection_schema.rejection_rule: Reject wet-lab protocols, actionable biosafety-risk instructions, infectivity optimization, immune evasion optimization, or operational host targeting.

rejection_schema.boundary_note: Readiness approval count and external validation count remain zero.
rejection_schema.rejection_rule: Reject candidates used to claim validation, readiness, proof, external validation, or independent experiment completion.
Reject candidates used to imply citation integration has already been completed.
Reject candidates used as permission to modify manuscript files or apply rewrites in this milestone.

rejection_schema.boundary_note: Toy evaluation actual run count remains zero.
rejection_schema.rejection_rule: Reject candidates used to imply executed evaluation, project performance results, metric scores, or validation outcomes.
Reject candidates used to imply scientific evidence gaps are closed.

rejection_schema.boundary_note: Future work may only introduce stronger claims after separately audited milestones.
rejection_schema.rejection_rule: Reject candidates used to imply future work has already occurred.

retrieval_gate_items.boundary_note: Retrieval readiness gate only. No source retrieval is performed.
retrieval_gate_items.fail_condition: Reject sources that imply biological validation, operational capability, or submission readiness.
retrieval_gate_items.pass_condition: A retrieved candidate must support governance framing without claiming validation, proof, or readiness.
retrieval_gate_items.readiness_requirement: Future retrieval may search only for governance-pipeline, claim-control, or safety-bounded reporting sources.

retrieval_gate_items.boundary_note: No source is claimed as verified.
retrieval_gate_items.fail_condition: Reject sources that only provide generic writing advice without evidence-boundary relevance.
retrieval_gate_items.pass_condition: A retrieved candidate must help separate draft, evidence, validation, and readiness language.
retrieval_gate_items.readiness_requirement: Future retrieval may search for research integrity, overclaiming, evidence-boundary, or reporting-discipline sources.

retrieval_gate_items.boundary_note: No real biological datasets, no real pathogen models, no receptor parameters, and no operational targeting are introduced.
retrieval_gate_items.fail_condition: Reject real biological datasets, real pathogen models, receptor-parameter sources, and operational targeting sources.
retrieval_gate_items.pass_condition: A retrieved candidate must support synthetic abstract toy-only scoping without importing real biological material.
retrieval_gate_items.readiness_requirement: Future retrieval may search for toy-model, abstract-model, non-operational simulation-boundary, or scope-limited-method sources.

retrieval_gate_items.boundary_note: Lineage support remains a future citation need, not evidence completion.
retrieval_gate_items.fail_condition: Reject sources that treat artifact tracking as proof, safety validation, performance evidence, or readiness approval.
retrieval_gate_items.pass_condition: A retrieved candidate must support artifact traceability without converting lineage into validation.
retrieval_gate_items.readiness_requirement: Future retrieval may search for staged workflows, artifact lineage, traceability, reproducible artifact tracking, or software process governance.

retrieval_gate_items.boundary_note: Zero counters are governance controls only.
retrieval_gate_items.fail_condition: Reject sources that would let zero counters be described as proof, external validation, or readiness approval.
retrieval_gate_items.pass_condition: A retrieved candidate must support explicit control logic without upgrading counters into proof.
retrieval_gate_items.readiness_requirement: Future retrieval may search for assurance arguments, safety cases, invariant checks, governance controls, or process controls.

retrieval_gate_items.boundary_note: Deferred claims remain deferred and prohibited claims remain prohibited.
retrieval_gate_items.fail_condition: Reject sources that collapse deferred claims into completed claims or turn prohibited claims into promises.
retrieval_gate_items.pass_condition: A retrieved candidate must support allowed, deferred, and prohibited claim separation.
retrieval_gate_items.readiness_requirement: Future retrieval may search for evidence grading, claim classification, responsible reporting, and validation-language discipline.

retrieval_gate_items.fail_condition: Reject sources used to claim citation integration, proof, validation, or readiness is complete.
retrieval_gate_items.pass_condition: A retrieved candidate must support evidence-gap mapping without implying that gaps are closed.
retrieval_gate_items.readiness_requirement: Future retrieval may search for evidence mapping, gap registers, validation roadmaps, and transparent limitation tracking.

retrieval_gate_items.boundary_note: Toy evaluation is designed but not executed.
retrieval_gate_items.fail_condition: Reject sources that would be used to imply executed evaluation, performance scores, or validation outcomes.
retrieval_gate_items.pass_condition: A retrieved candidate must support evaluation design without reporting project results.
retrieval_gate_items.readiness_requirement: Future retrieval may search for evaluation design, toy metrics, traceability metrics, reproducibility checks, or non-operational evaluation planning.

retrieval_gate_items.fail_condition: Reject sources that would be used as permission to apply a rewrite in this milestone.
retrieval_gate_items.pass_condition: A retrieved candidate must support narrative coherence or limitation transparency without authorizing manuscript mutation.
retrieval_gate_items.readiness_requirement: Future retrieval may search for scientific writing coherence, argumentation, limitation framing, reviewer-facing narrative, or future-work sequencing.

retrieval_gate_items.boundary_note: Manuscript submission ready count remains zero.
retrieval_gate_items.fail_condition: Reject sources that soften or remove non-readiness, non-validation, non-proof, or non-evidence statements.
retrieval_gate_items.pass_condition: A retrieved candidate must support transparent non-readiness and non-validation language.
retrieval_gate_items.readiness_requirement: Future retrieval may search for limitation transparency, validation boundaries, non-readiness statements, or responsible evidence restraint.

retrieval_gate_items.boundary_note: Wet-lab protocol count and actionable biosafety-risk instruction count remain zero.
retrieval_gate_items.fail_condition: Reject wet-lab protocols, actionable biosafety-risk instructions, real-world infectivity optimization, immune evasion optimization, host range prediction, and operational host targeting.
retrieval_gate_items.pass_condition: A retrieved candidate must support explicit safety exclusions without operational content.
retrieval_gate_items.readiness_requirement: Future retrieval may search only for safe research boundaries, dual-use risk management, non-operational framing, or exclusion-language sources.

retrieval_gate_items.boundary_note: Future work may only introduce stronger claims after separately audited milestones.
retrieval_gate_items.fail_condition: Reject sources used to imply citation integration, evaluation execution, readiness, proof, or validation has already happened.
retrieval_gate_items.pass_condition: A retrieved candidate must support future-work sequencing without implying the work has already occurred.
retrieval_gate_items.readiness_requirement: Future retrieval may search for staged validation, responsible claim escalation, reproducible artifact packaging, or roadmap discipline.
